abstract: This is a real-world playbook for deploying an autonomous AI agent — named Larry — on a personal machine to run business operations with zero human intervention. It is for anyone seeking to build, scale, and monetize digital products without hiring staff or relying on traditional marketing teams. The outcome is a self-sustaining income stream generated while sleeping: $7,000+ per month from apps, a skill marketplace, and viral content — all orchestrated by a single AI agent running on an old gam

source_article.title: How a personal AI agent will change your entire life in 1 day.
source_article.author: @ManiClones
